title: Sealaska Partners for Northern California Shareholder Event
summary: Sealaska is partnering with Central Council of the Tlingit and Haida Indian Tribes of Alaska (Tlingit & Haida) and Sealaska Heritage Institute (SHI) to host a community gathering in Roseville, CA on Saturday, Jan. 11. title: Sealaska to Achieve Third Straight Year of Record Financial Profit
summary: As we near the end of 2019, Sealaska can look back and be proud of another successful year due to our business growth. Sealaska expects to meet and exceed its record net income of $65.2 million in 2018. Please note, Sealaska’s final 2019 audited financials will be published in May 2020. Sealaska ach...

title: Sealaska Hires Carrie Rorem as Chief Financial Officer
summary: As the new chief financial officer, Carrie Rorem leads Sealaska’s finance and information technology departments. title: Sealaska Hires Shareholder to Lead Community Outreach Efforts
summary: Sealaska recently hired shareholder Matt Carle as director of community outreach. In this role, Matt is responsible for managing the company’s engagement with shareholders and Southeast Alaska communities in the areas of education, workforce development, and economic development. title: Tlingit Culture Specialist Honored for Work in the Juneau School District
summary: Tlingit cultural icon David Katzeek was honored by the Juneau School District Board of Education and issued a legislative citation from the 31st Alaska State Legislature. title: Welcome to Sealaska, New Shareholder Joseph Casulucan
summary: In November 2019, Joseph (Kusataan) Casulucan received his first check as a new enrolled shareholder descendant. title: Update on Alaska Natives Without Land
summary: Over the summer of 2019, Sealaska pledged $500,000 in support of the Alaska Native landless communities of Southeast and their continued push for their own village corporations in their communities.
